data.content: Constrained the selected queue-row description and notes summary panes to 75% of their prior combined width, keeping each subcolumn at 37.5% so the focused row fits laptop screens. Added a layout regression test. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-813a. Commit: 8c87638b.
